title: GROUP_SEND: online members receive after departure (no membership re-check for live sends)
description: broadcast_to_group re-checks membership only before offline-enqueue, not before live send. Trigger: member A calls GROUP_LEAVE; concurrently, member B calls GROUP_SEND. A is in the member list fetched before the leave committed, and A is still connected (live channel). broadcast_to_group sends to A's live channel with no membership re-check. A receives a group message after departure via live delivery. The offline path is guarded but the live path is not, so the fix is asymmetric.
